seoTitle: Telegraph Point vs Telopea — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Telegraph Point and Telopea. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Telegraph Point vs Telopea: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Telegraph Point and Telopea.
heading: Telegraph Point vs Telopea — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Telegraph Point, New South Wales and Telopea, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Telegraph Point has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Telopea (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Telegraph Point or Telopea safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Telegraph Point has a flood risk score of 44/100, while Telopea scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Telegraph Point scores 40/100 for bushfire risk. Telopea scores 33/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Telegraph Point or Telopea?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Telegraph Point has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.05% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
